purpose: Compare future style directions against a semantic benchmark before any source, SVG, acceptance, release-state, or golden mutation.

strengths: mature multipanel story with A-F roles and row-level evidence flow
paper-local style profile with restrained editorial hierarchy
semantic color economy across polymer, shallow trap, deep trap, and force families
existing benchmark_contract and aesthetic_intent assets for detector-grounded review
weaknesses: dense Row 2 evidence panels can regress into cramped label or rule crowding
component detail must stay mechanism-bound to avoid generic icon polish
publication and provenance readiness remain explicit human policy gates

forbidden_semantic_changes: change A/B/C/D/E/F panel roles or move evidence between columns
rename symbols, measured quantities, force families, or apparatus labels
swap shallow/deep trap color semantics or force-direction meaning
remove required labels, spokes, apparatus elements, or theory-guarded mechanisms
use SVG polish to repair scientific, semantic, or label-target errors that belong in TikZ/source review

candidate_family_slots.label: Keep current style
candidate_family_slots.entry_condition: No candidate clearly improves manuscript value without increasing semantic or release risk.
candidate_family_slots.acceptance_rule: Accept as benchmark winner when alternatives improve only taste language or introduce semantic ambiguity.
can_improve: preserve the current generated export as the semantic baseline until another family proves a measurable manuscript-value gain
reduce release risk by keeping accepted, export, golden, final-artifact, and publication state untouched
forbidden_semantic_changes: must not change A/B/C/D/E/F panel roles, force-family meaning, shallow/deep trap colors, apparatus labels, or measured quantities
proof_evidence: fresh render, critique, export, and benchmark evidence remain non-regressing
no alternative demonstrates better measurable checks plus human journal-fit approval
candidate_family_slots.human_only_question: Is the existing restrained overview already the best manuscript-fit baseline for this figure?

candidate_family_slots.label: Restrained TikZ refinement
candidate_family_slots.entry_condition: A bounded source-level patch can improve typography, whitespace, stroke rhythm, or component fidelity without changing meaning.
candidate_family_slots.acceptance_rule: Must preserve all forbidden semantics and improve at least one measurable check or named aesthetic lever.
can_improve: bounded typography, whitespace, stroke rhythm, rule crowding, or component fidelity while preserving the existing source story
forbidden_semantic_changes: must not move evidence between columns, rename symbols or apparatus labels, alter force direction meaning, or swap shallow/deep trap color semantics
proof_evidence: source-level patch has separate approval and passes benchmark hard-regression gates
text_boundary_delta or visual_clash_delta decreases_or_equal with style_lock_typography clean
candidate_family_slots.human_only_question: Is the improvement a bounded source polish rather than a broader redesign request?

candidate_family_slots.label: Editorial redesign
candidate_family_slots.entry_condition: Human explicitly asks for a broader visual-language alternative after seeing benchmark tradeoffs.
candidate_family_slots.acceptance_rule: Must beat current style on journal-fit and readability while preserving panel roles, labels, semantic colors, and mechanism story.
can_improve: broader journal-fit, visual hierarchy, and editorial clarity when the current style is judged insufficient
forbidden_semantic_changes: must not change panel roles, semantic colors, mechanism story, apparatus roles, measured quantities, or theory-guarded mechanisms
proof_evidence: human explicitly requests editorial redesign after benchmark review
candidate beats current style on readability and journal fit while preserving every forbidden semantic change
candidate_family_slots.human_only_question: Does a broader editorial route justify its added semantic and release risk?

candidate_family_slots.label: SVG polish handoff
candidate_family_slots.entry_condition: TikZ/source semantics are locked and ready_for_svg_polish evidence is positive.
candidate_family_slots.acceptance_rule: May adjust only optical spacing, stroke finish, or texture nuance; semantic repair must return to TikZ/source review.
can_improve: optical spacing, stroke finish, texture nuance, or export presentation after TikZ/source semantics are locked
forbidden_semantic_changes: must not repair or alter scientific meaning, label targets, panel roles, source semantics, or color semantics in SVG space
proof_evidence: separate SVG artifact mutation approval exists and no source-level semantic defect remains
candidate_family_slots.human_only_question: Is SVG polish actually ready, or should semantic repair return to TikZ/source review?

must_pass: panel labels and role labels keep controlled hierarchy

measurable_checks.source: detector reports when rendered artifacts exist

human_only_questions: Does the candidate improve journal fit enough to justify leaving the current restrained manuscript style?
Does the candidate feel editorial rather than generic template polish?
Should the release operator defer protected golden mutation until a comparison view is reviewed?
Is this figure being promoted toward a flagship visual, or should it remain a restrained main-text overview?
candidate_rejection_rules: reject a prettier candidate if it changes semantics, labels, panel roles, or color meaning
reject SVG polish if it is being used to fix source-level semantic defects
reject broad redesign if the only improvement is non-measurable taste language
reject any route that implies accepted-state, release-state, final-artifact, export, or golden mutation without a separate explicit gate
